mapper.select:
SELECT id, code, name, length, width, tare_weight, max_load, max_stack, remark, status, deleted, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by FROM pallet_type WHERE deleted = 0
AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY length DESC, id ASC
